items.q: How far in advance should I book?
items.a: For major weddings in Dubai, we recommend booking 6-12 months in advance to secure the best venues and vendors.
Yes, while we specialize in Dubai, we have extensive experience managing luxury destination weddings across the UAE and internationally.

items.q: Can I use my own vendors?
items.a: Absolutely. While we have a curated list of elite partners, we are happy to work with any professional vendors you prefer, provided they meet our quality standards.

pages.title: Terms of Service
pages.description: The legal framework for our partnership. Please review our terms and conditions.

config.title: Terms of Service
config.subtitle: Understanding the foundation of our professional relationship and service delivery.

config.title: Legal Framework
config.subtitle: Key terms governing the use of our platform and services.
config.content:
### 1. Acceptance of Terms
By accessing or using the YA Wedding platform, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service and all applicable laws and regulations in the UAE.

### 2. Scope of Services
YA Wedding provides event planning, coordination, and management services. The specific scope of work for each project will be defined in a separate Service Agreement.

### 3. User Responsibilities
Clients are responsible for providing accurate information, timely feedback, and adhering to the agreed-upon payment schedules.

### 4. Intellectual Property
All designs, concepts, and materials created by YA Wedding remain our intellectual property unless otherwise agreed upon in writing.

### 5. Limitation of Liability
YA Wedding shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from the use of our services or the actions of third-party vendors.

pages.title: Privacy Policy
pages.description: How we protect and manage your personal information at YA Wedding.

config.title: Your Privacy Matters
config.subtitle: We are dedicated to protecting your personal data and maintaining your trust through transparency.

config.title: Data Protection
config.subtitle: Our commitment to your personal information security.
config.content:
### Information Collection
We collect information necessary to provide our luxury planning services, including contact details, event preferences, and financial information for billing purposes.

### How We Use Your Data
Your information is used to personalize your experience, process transactions, and communicate important updates regarding your event.

### Data Sharing
We only share your information with trusted third-party vendors who are essential to the execution of your event. We never sell your data to third parties.

### Your Rights
You have the right to access, correct, or request the deletion of your personal data at any time. Contact our privacy officer for assistance.

pages.title: Return and Refund
pages.description: Our transparent policies regarding cancellations, returns, and refunds.

config.title: Refund & Return Policy
config.subtitle: Clear and fair policies designed to provide flexibility and peace of mind for our clients.

config.title: Policy Details
config.subtitle: Understanding our cancellation and return procedures.
config.content:
### Service Cancellations
Cancellations made more than 60 days before the event are eligible for a 50% refund of the deposit. Cancellations within 30 days are non-refundable but may be credited toward a future date.

### Rental Item Returns
All rental equipment must be returned within 24 hours of the event conclusion. Items must be in their original condition to avoid damage fees.

### Refund Processing
Approved refunds are processed within 14 business days. The funds will be returned to the original payment method used during booking.

### Force Majeure
In the event of government-mandated restrictions or natural disasters, we offer full flexibility to reschedule your event without penalty.

config.title: Have Questions?
config.subtitle: Our team is here to clarify any policy details for you.
